hero.name: Konjeti Venkata Sai Manikanta
hero.tagline: I build fullstack web apps and AI-powered systems — from disease-prediction models to marketplace platforms.
hero.workstationImageAlt: Modern dual-monitor developer workstation with mechanical keyboard, bathed in purple and blue ambient light

about.intro: I'm an Integrated M.Tech Software Engineering student at VIT-AP University, graduating in 2027, with a CGPA of 8.04/10. I enjoy turning ideas into working software — from machine learning models that predict disease to full marketplace platforms with defect-detection AI baked in.
about.objective: Looking for a Software Development Engineer role where I can apply my skills in Java, Python, and full-stack web development to build reliable, scalable products — and keep learning from engineers better than me.
strengths: Hands-on experience building full-stack and ML applications
Quick learner with a deep interest in Java technologies
Excellent teamwork, communication, and debugging skills
